title: Shri Vishnu Bhagwan Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Vishnu Bhagwan Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Lord Vishnu.
description:
Om Jai Jagdish Hare,
Swami Jai Jagdish Hare.
Bhakt janon ke sankat,
Das janon ke sankat,
Kshan mein door kare॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Jo dhyave phal paave,
Dukh binse man ka.
Swami dukh binse man ka.
Sukh sampati ghar aave,
Kasht mite tan ka॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Maat-pita tum mere,
Sharan gahun kiski.
Swami sharan gahun main kiski.
Tum bin aur na dooja,
Aas karun main kiski॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Tum pooran parmatma,
Tum antaryami.
Swami tum antaryami.
Parbrahm parmeshwar,
Tum sabke swami॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Tum karuna ke sagar,
Tum palankarta.
Swami tum palankarta.
Main moorakh falkami,
Main sevak tum swami,
Kripa karo bharta॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Tum ho ek agochar,
Sabke pranpati.
Swami sabke pranpati.
Kis vidhi miloon dayamay,
Tumko main kumati॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Deenbandhu dukhaharta,
Thakur tum mere.
Swami thakur tum mere.
Apne haath uthao,
Dwar pada main tere॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Vishay vikar mitao,
Paap haro deva.
Swami paap haro deva.
Shraddha bhakti badhao,
Santan ki seva॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Tan-man-dhan aur sampati,
Sab kuch hai tera.
Swami sab kuch hai tera.
Tera tujhko arpan,
Kya laage mera॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥
